title: kysely Is Trending: Here's What Backend Developers Need to Know
description: kysely is trending on GitHub with 8963.4k new stars this week. Type safe SQL query builder.
bodyHtml:
kysely is making waves in the Backend ecosystem this week, gaining 8963.4k new stars. With a total of 14.0k stars on GitHub and 420 forks, this open-source project is rapidly becoming a go-to tool for developers worldwide.

⭐ 14.0kStars
📈 +8963.4k/wkGrowth
🔀 420Forks
⚠️ 168Open Issues

Key Features

  • Written in JavaScript/TypeScript for maximum performance
  • Licensed under MIT — free to use and modify
  • Official website: https://kysely.dev
  • 🏷️ query
  • 🏷️ builder
  • 🏷️ query builder
  • 🏷️ sql
  • 🏷️ typescript

Why kysely Is Trending

The Backend landscape is constantly evolving, and kysely has emerged as one of the fastest-growing projects this week. Several factors contribute to its momentum:

  1. Growing community: With 8963.4k new stars this week alone, developer adoption is accelerating rapidly.
  2. Active maintenance: The project sees regular updates, ensuring compatibility with the latest ecosystem changes.
  3. Practical utility: Type safe SQL query builder

If you're working in Backend, this is definitely a project worth watching — and adopting.

Quick Start

Get started with kysely in minutes:

# Clone the repository git clone https://www.npmjs.com/package/kysely # Navigate to project cd kysely # Check the README for detailed setup instructions

For full documentation and advanced usage, visit the official GitHub repository.

Final Thoughts

kysely is a solid addition to any developer's toolkit. With its growing community, active development, and practical design, it's well worth your time to evaluate. Star it on GitHub, try it in a side project, and see if it fits your workflow.
